description: Rejection after interview — stage rejected, action update_stage
subject: Re: Your application for Backend Engineer at CloudBase AG
raw_text:
Dear Kirill,

Thank you for taking the time to interview with us for the Backend Engineer position at CloudBase AG.

After careful consideration, we have decided to move forward with another candidate whose experience more closely matches our current needs.

We appreciate your interest in CloudBase AG and wish you all the best in your job search.

Best regards,
Lena Schneider
HR Manager
CloudBase AG
